category_sources: Official nongnu.org clzip page describes lzip as a lossless data compressor.
source_facts.description says clzip is a C language version of lzip.
display_name_sources: Official nongnu.org page title uses Clzip.
docs_sources: Official Clzip page links to the online clzip manual.
source_facts.homepage is the official Clzip project page.
repo_sources: Official Clzip page points to release downloads and the Savannah project page, but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: Official Clzip page describes lzip compression, decompression, archives, and C implementation context.
